blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,623 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
